note: Channel set (X / Instagram / Telegram / Medium, all @evallense) is hard-duplicated in Footer and contact page -> candidate-for-extraction. preparer only records; does NOT extract.

social.name: Contact SOCIALS
social.accessibility: Button target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer; <svg aria-hidden>; label text beside glyph

social.name: InTheLoop share link

extraction_recommendation: If extracted later (via component-forge, NOT here): shared SOCIALS data + a SocialLinks component with a render-shape prop (<a> vs Button).
